name: Global uniques
uniques: Triggers a [Based and Christpilled] event <after founding a religion> <upon turn end> <every [999] turns> <for [Human player] Civilizations>

Triggers a [Idk what is this] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [1]% chance>
Triggers a [The Guest Star in starry night] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [4]% chance>
